prompt: Create an 'Update API Token' feature. It needs a client-side form using a mocked shadcn/ui input. Submission must call a Server Action that issues a PUT request via apiClient. Keep the design extremely clean, Linear-inspired, with high-contrast monochrome states and Geist typography.

assertions.name: assert_feature_rules.py
assertions.description: Validates FSD features, client/server boundaries, apiClient.PUT, Geist typography, and minimal styling.
